meta.title: Kling 3.0 AI Video Generator | Cinematic Quality | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create cinematic-quality AI videos with Kling 3.0 by Kuaishou. Up to 15s duration, native multi-language audio, multi-shot camera control, and ultimate subject consistency. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Kling 3.0 is Kuaishou's first unified multimodal video model, combining world-class 4K visuals, native multi-language audio, multi-shot storyboarding, and an advanced physics engine into a single creative architecture. The era of the AI Director.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: The unified architecture powering the next generation of AI-directed video creation

cinematic4K.title: Native 4K Cinematic Output
cinematic4K.description: Ultra-high-definition 4K output with native text rendering. Logos, titles, and branded elements remain sharp and readable throughout every frame.

multiShot.title: Multi-Shot Storyboarding
multiShot.description: Generate cinematic sequences with up to 6 distinct camera cuts in a single pass, including shot-reverse-shot dialogue patterns and automatic camera transitions.

audioGeneration.title: Enhanced Audio Generation
audioGeneration.description: Character-specific voice referencing integrated into video generation. Support for English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and regional dialects.

subjectConsistency.title: Absolute Subject Consistency
subjectConsistency.description: Lock characters, props, and voices using the Elements 3.0 video-reference system. Maintain visual identity across multiple shots, angles, and scene transitions.

physics.title: Directorial Physics Engine
physics.description: Advanced simulation of fluid dynamics, gravity, and complex object interactions delivers photorealistic motion that follows real-world physical laws.

extendedDuration.title: Extended 15s Duration
extendedDuration.description: Native generations up to 15 seconds with custom timing control, enabling fuller narrative arcs, long takes, and multiple plot twists within a single video.

tierComparison.title: Standard vs Pro
tierComparison.subtitle: Same prompt, different tiers — compare the output quality of Kling 3.0 Standard and Pro
tierComparison.prompt: Cinematic medium slow dolly zoom. A hulking knight stands at center frame like a steel sculpture. Hands clasped in heavy metal gauntlets, pressing down on the pommel of a massive two-handed greatsword thrust into frost-covered dark earth. Dark silver Valyrian steel-style plate armor with visible hammer marks, dragon scale etchings, fine scratches, dents, and dried blood — reflecting cold metallic sheen under frigid moonlight. Heavy fur cloak trembling in the wind. Shallow depth of field background suggesting a smoke-shrouded castle ruin. Epic grain with falling snowflakes and distant embers. Game of Thrones-style low-contrast cool tones with warm firelight on the armor side, creating dramatic cold-warm contrast.

pricing.description: Kuaishou's most advanced cinematic video model

0.question: What is Kling 3.0 and who developed it?
0.answer: Kling 3.0 is Kuaishou's first unified multimodal video model, launched in February 2026. It includes Video 3.0 and Video 3.0 Omni variants, unifying world-class 4K visuals, native audio, multi-shot storyboarding, and an advanced physics engine into a single AI Director architecture.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Kling 3.0?
1.answer: Kling 3.0 excels at cinematic storytelling, brand advertising, e-commerce product videos, social media content, multi-person dialogue scenes, and multilingual content. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation with multi-shot storyboard control.

2.question: How long can Kling 3.0 videos be?
2.answer: Kling 3.0 supports video generation up to 15 seconds with custom timing control, a significant upgrade from the previous 10-second limit. This enables complex sequences including long takes and multiple plot twists.

3.question: What languages does Kling 3.0 support for audio?
3.answer: Kling 3.0 supports native audio generation in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish, including various regional accents and dialects. It can generate complex multi-character dialogue where each character speaks a different language.

4.question: What is the multi-shot feature in Kling 3.0?
4.answer: Kling 3.0 supports up to 6 distinct camera cuts within a single video. Creators can define individual storyboard frames, shot sizes, perspectives, narrative content, and camera movements for each shot, transforming it into a preliminary editing tool.

5.question: How does Kling 3.0 compare to Kling 2.6 and other models?
5.answer: Kling 3.0 evolves Kling 2.6's native audio into a full AI Director workflow. Key upgrades: native 4K output, multi-shot storyboarding with up to 6 camera cuts, Elements 3.0 for absolute subject consistency, a new directorial physics engine, extended 15s duration, and 5-language audio support. It competes directly with Veo 3.1 and Sora 2.
